positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical cosmic forest scene. Central composition features bioluminescent crystalline flora and mythical, stylized fauna (like glowing deer and ethereal jellyfish) interacting with ancient, root-like geometric structures. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, rendered in vivid jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald green, amethyst purple) accented by neon cyan light trails. Emphasis on clean, sharp silhouettes and high-contrast linework against a midnight black background. The overall aesthetic should be intricate, mystical, and suitable for direct screen printing on dark apparel. Intricate detail, perfect symmetry, cinematic depth of field.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, messy background, gradient, blurry edges
